name: Spinach and Buttermilk Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the frozen chopped spinach and 2 cups of chicken broth in a 3- to 4-quart pan. Bring to boil on high heat; use a spoon to break the spinach apart. As soon as the spinach is in chunks, pour into a blender, add 1 tablespoon lemon peel, and puree until smooth.
2. In the pan, mix the remaining 2 cups of broth with cornstarch until smooth; then add the spinach mixture. Stir often on high heat until boiling. Mix in buttermilk and pour into bowls or mugs. Sprinkle with the remaining lemon peel and add salt and pepper to taste.
